steps.title: Spot the predictive claim
steps.content: The passage establishes that examining an item's age is the best way to predict how much longer it will last.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Indicator means something that signals or points to something else—exactly what age does as the best predictor of durability. The other options either reverse this relationship (uncertainty suggests age confuses rather than clarifies) or are unrelated to prediction (motivation and criticism). That matches choice B — B is correct.
